reviews.comment:
Almorcé en la Parrilla, muy buen precio, excelente atención y bien servidos sus platos. Muy pocos clientes.

(Translated by Google)
I had lunch at La Parrilla. The price was very good, the service was excellent, and the dishes were well-served. Very few customers.

reviews.comment:
El lugar, arto conocido por quienes viajan a Mardel, es agradable, siempre tiene combustible seguro como es costumbre en las ACA y la atención es correcta

(Translated by Google)
The place, well known to those who travel to Mar del Plata, is pleasant, always has reliable fuel as is customary at ACA stations, and the service is adequate.
